title: Crash on transitive WHERE constraint and undefined collation
poc:
SELECT statements in the following SQL provoke a NULL pointer deference:
CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER PRIMARY KEY);
CREATE TABLE t2(b INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, x1 INT COLLATE NOCASE);
SELECT * FROM t3, t2, t1 WHERE x2=b AND x1=a AND a=1;
SELECT * FROM t3, t2, t1 WHERE b=x2 AND a=x1 AND 1=a;
key_bug_features: Transitive WHERE constraint with undefined collation
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, b TEXT COLLATE NOCASE);
CREATE TABLE t2(b INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, x1 INT COLLATE NOCASE, x2 REAL DEFAULT NULL);
CREATE TABLE t3(x2 INT, x3 TEXT);
SELECT * FROM t3 JOIN t2 ON t3.x2 = t2.b WHERE t2.x1 = (SELECT a FROM t1 WHERE b = 'Test') AND t3.x2 IS NOT NULL;
